name: Spicy Szechwan Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tbsp Cornstarch dissolved in 2 tbsp water
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and rinse the tofu.
2. Drain again.
3. Cut into 1-inch square pieces.
4. Heat a wok over high flame and add oil when hot.
5. Add ginger, garlic, and 2 tbsp scallions to the wok. Cook for 30 seconds.
6. Add the Szechwan hot bean paste and tofu.
7. Stir gently.
8. Add tamari, salt, sugar, and stock. Bring to a full boil.
9. Thicken with cornstarch dissolved in 2 tbsp water.
10. Add sesame oil, chili oil, and Szechwan peppercorn powder.
11. Sprinkle with remaining scallions.
12. Serve with brown rice.
